# Cameroon Administrative Divisions

> Open dataset of Cameroon's administrative hierarchy:
> 10 regions, 58 divisions, 360 subdivisions.
> CC-BY-4.0 licensed.

## Quick Reference

- Total regions: 10
- Total divisions: 58
- Total subdivisions: 360
- Coordinates: included (all levels)
- Last updated: 2026-05-22
- License: CC-BY-4.0

## Aggregate Data Files

- [All regions (JSON)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/cameroon-administrative-divisions/main/data/all-region.json)
- [All divisions (JSON)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/cameroon-administrative-divisions/main/data/all-division.json)
- [All subdivisions (JSON)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/cameroon-administrative-divisions/main/data/all-subdivision.json)
- [Flat array (NDJSON)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/cameroon-administrative-divisions/main/data/all-flat.ndjson)
- [Hierarchy tree (JSON)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/cameroon-administrative-divisions/main/data/hierarchy.json)
- [JSON Schema](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/cameroon-administrative-divisions/main/data/schema.json)

## Browse by Region

- [Adamawa](https://github.com/open-admin-data/cameroon-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/adamawa-cm001/) — 5 divisions, 21 subdivisions
- [Centre](https://github.com/open-admin-data/cameroon-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/centre-cm002/) — 10 divisions, 70 subdivisions
- [East](https://github.com/open-admin-data/cameroon-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/east-cm003/) — 4 divisions, 33 subdivisions
- [Far-North](https://github.com/open-admin-data/cameroon-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/far-north-cm004/) — 6 divisions, 47 subdivisions
- [Littoral](https://github.com/open-admin-data/cameroon-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/littoral-cm005/) — 4 divisions, 34 subdivisions
- [North](https://github.com/open-admin-data/cameroon-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/north-cm006/) — 4 divisions, 21 subdivisions
- [North-West](https://github.com/open-admin-data/cameroon-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/north-west-cm007/) — 7 divisions, 34 subdivisions
- [South](https://github.com/open-admin-data/cameroon-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/south-cm009/) — 4 divisions, 29 subdivisions
- [South-West](https://github.com/open-admin-data/cameroon-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/south-west-cm010/) — 6 divisions, 31 subdivisions
- [West](https://github.com/open-admin-data/cameroon-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/west-cm008/) — 8 divisions, 40 subdivisions

- [Adamawa](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/cameroon-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/adamawa-cm001.txt)
- [Centre](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/cameroon-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/centre-cm002.txt)
- [East](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/cameroon-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/east-cm003.txt)
- [Far-North](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/cameroon-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/far-north-cm004.txt)
- [Littoral](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/cameroon-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/littoral-cm005.txt)
- [North](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/cameroon-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/north-cm006.txt)
- [North-West](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/cameroon-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/north-west-cm007.txt)
- [South](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/cameroon-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/south-cm009.txt)
- [South-West](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/cameroon-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/south-west-cm010.txt)
- [West](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/cameroon-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/west-cm008.txt)

## Schema Fields

- id: Unique identifier
- level: 1 (region), 2 (division), 3 (subdivision)
- name: Local and English names with URL slug
- code: Government codes
- parent: Reference to parent division
- ancestors: Full chain to root
- children_count: Count of children per level
- zip_codes: Postal codes (where available)
- geo: Geographic coordinates (lat/lon, WGS84, all levels)

## Citation

Cameroon Administrative Divisions Dataset (CC-BY-4.0)
URL: https://github.com/open-admin-data/cameroon-administrative-divisions

- [ListBase](https://www.listbase.org) — Structured reference data for every country
- [open-admin-data](https://github.com/open-admin-data) — Open admin data for ASEAN
